title: vitis cinerea var. tomentosa
intro: Vitis cinerea var. tomentosa, also known as the hairy grapevine or hairy woodbine, is a deciduous woody vine native to the southeastern United States. Its medicinal properties include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Vitis cinerea var. tomentosa include reducing pain and inflammation, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Vitis cinerea var. tomentosa can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
